meta.name: description
meta.content: Entdecken Sie unser modernes Ferienhaus in Jois. Mit 160m² bietet es Platz für unvergessliche Urlaube. Genießen Sie die private Atmosphäre und die Nähe zur Natur. Ideal für Familien und Gruppen. Buchen Sie jetzt Ihren Aufenthalt in unserem Neubau!

attrs.title: A coastal scene featuring a large, elegant house with a dark roof, situated beside a curving road that runs parallel to the ocean. The property is surrounded by lush greenery and well-maintained garden areas. Behind the house, the expansive ocean is visible, with clear skies overhead. Several smaller buildings and houses are situated further along the coastline.
